query:
SELECT id, phone, firstName, status, syncStatus, lastSyncAt, totalTgDialogs FROM telegram_accounts ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5;
SELECT telegramAccountId, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM dialogs GROUP BY telegramAccountId;
